reasoning: I can’t share my internal chain-of-thought, but here’s a concise, constructive reply you can use to address the concern and guide the user toward real fixes.
output:
Hey, I hear you—and I’m sorry you’re dealing with bugs and lag. We know it’s frustrating after you’ve supported the game. Our team is actively Investigating reports and pushing patches to improve stability and performance. Here are some steps that can help right now:

- Make sure you’re on the latest patch and that all performance fixes have been installed.
- Update your graphics drivers and OS to the latest versions.
- Try lower in-game settings: resolution, textures, shadows, post-processing, and disable ray tracing if available.
- Enable a frame-rate cap or V-Sync to smooth out stutter if you’re seeing spikes.
- Close background applications and ensure your system meets the recommended requirements.
- If issues persist, please share your system specs (CPU/GPU/RAM), your OS version, and any crash/error logs so we can investigate more effectively.

We appreciate your feedback and patience. We’re committed to optimizing the game and will post updates as soon as they’re ready.
